person.name: Mary Bowen

memoryArtifacts.headline: Weld Collections, by Charles Frederick Robinson, pg 56
Child Family Reunion - 27 Feb. 1921 at Clinton Day Festivities - Descendant visitors were from Alfred Bosworth & Polly Barber Child Family
This set of 3 vol. has Mary Bowen lines listed in it and others a great resource to help you research.
From: The Lineage of the Bowens of Woodstock, Connecticut

deathPlace.address: Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, British Colonial America

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Mary is listed with no maiden name in the book, Genealogy of the Child, Childs, and Childe Families (see attached under Sources).  

However, Mary is listed as Mary Bowen in the book, "The History of Peter Parker and Sarah Ruggles of Roxbury, Mass. and their Ancestors and Descendants..." According to this source, Mary was the daughter of Griffith Bowen.  Mary Childe, ye wife of Benjamin Childe, was admitted to the church in Roxbury 23 January 1658.  She was mentioned in the administration of her father Griffith Bowen's estate, as the widow child, 6 November 1683.  

At a Court held in Boston 6 Nov. 1683, Mr. Jacob Eliot of Boston, Lieut. Samuel Ruggles, & John Bowles, both of Roxbury, appointed a Committee for Division & Settlement of the Estate of Mr. Griffith Bowen formerly of Boston deceased, intestate. To Francis his eldest son, a double portion, & equal portions to the other children. with the consent & to the satisfaction of those concerned viz: Mr. William Bowen, Mr. John Weld, widow Child, & Henery Bowen. Dated Rox. 21 Feb. 1683-4. (Francis was the oldest born sibling; her sister Margaret was married to John Weld. William Bowen and Henry Bowen were also her brothers. She has sister Elizabeth Bowen Addington, and other siblings who died without heirs.) Mary's four youngest siblings have christening records, as they were all born in or near Boston.  None of the oldest children who were born across the pond have any christening records we have been able to find.  

Mary came to Massachusetts in about 1638, at the age of 3. Griffith purchased ground next to Benjamin Child's property. Benjamin and Mary Bowen were married about 1653. Her father returned to England about ten years later, leaving most of his children settled in America. 

Elias Child, author of the book "Genealogy of the Child, Childs, and Childe families : of the past and present in the United States and the Canadas, from 1630..." published in 1881 had a chapter dedicated to Deacon Ephraim Child and Mary's husband Benjamin Child. Elias mentions in his book that Benjamin had 12 children; I have only found evidence for 11. He also mentioned that Benjamin Junior was this Benjamin's second child; I think he was probably his third child. His headstone indicated that Benjamin Junior was in his 66th year when he died in 1724, giving him an estimated birth year of 1659. Joshua's indicated that he died in his 73rd year in 1730, giving him an estimated birth year of 1658.

1. Ephraim - about 1654
*2. Benjamin - about 1659
3. Joshua - about 1658
4. Mary - b. 8 August 1660
5. Infant - b. 1662
6. Elizabeth - b. 2 December 1663
7. Margaret -b. 21 December 1665
8. John - b. 8 January 1667
9. Mehitable - b. 29 June 1669
10. John - b. 1 August 1671
11. Joseph - b. 1 June 1673
12. Joseph - b. 10 December 1674

The first three sons were all baptized (all "owned the covenant") at Roxbury, MA on Feb 27,1658/9.

NOTE: Based on the date and location of her death, Mary would have been buried in the Eliot Burying Ground. No stone has been found.  We need to make a tombstone for Benjamin Child and Mary Bowen as they are our immigrant ancestors.  The Eliot Burying ground has roads going all around it much like a roundabout in Roxbury.

If she was 3 when she came to Boston and her father arrived in Boston about 1637 (Elizabeth b. in Wales ca 1637 and Esther b. in Boston 1638), Mary would have been b. ca 1635.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Bowen於大約1635年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根高維爾時，她的父親Griffith Bowen36歲，母親Margaret Fleming37歲。她於大約1653年與Benjamin Child在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1707年10月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Bowen于大约1635年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根高維爾时，她的父亲Griffith Bowen36岁，母亲Margaret Fleming37岁。她于大约1653年与Benjamin Child在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1707年10月31日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛波利享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bowen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Owain ‘son of Owain’ (see Owen ), with fused patronymic marker (a)p, which is normally voiced before a vowel.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin ‘descendant of Buadhachán’, a diminutive of Buadhach ‘victorious’ (see Bohan ).
Irish: used to ‘translate’ Ó Cnáimhín ‘descendant of Cnáimhín’, a personal name meaning ‘little bone’ or ‘little body’, see Nevin 1.

variants.name: Bowan
meanings: Irish: variant of Bowen 2, from Gaelic Ó Buadhacháin ‘descendant of Buadhachán’.

variants.name: Bowens
meanings: Welsh, Irish (Mayo), and English: variant of Bowen , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Owen
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Owain, from Latin Eugenius (see Eugene ). This Welsh personal name is cognate with Old Irish Eogán, see 2 and 3.
Scottish and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Eoghain ‘son of Eoghan’. See McEwen .
Irish: from Ó hEoghain, ‘descendant of Eoghan’. See Ewen .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Bowen was born about 1635, in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Griffith Bowen, was 36 and her mother, Margaret Fleming, was 37. She married Benjamin Child about 1653, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 31 October 1707, in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Bowen est née environ 1635, à Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Griffith Bowen, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fleming, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin Child environ 1653, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 octobre 1707, à Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Bowen um 1635 in Gower, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Griffith Bowen 36 und ihre Mutter Margaret Fleming 37. Sie hat um 1653 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Benjamin Child geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Oktober 1707 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bowen è nata il circa 1635 nel Gower, Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Griffith Bowen, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Margaret Fleming, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Benjamin Child circa 1653, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 31 ottobre 1707, nel Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Bowenが約1635年にウェールズグラモーガンゴウエルで生まれた時，父Griffith Bowenは36歳，母Margaret Flemingは37歳であった。約1653年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでBenjamin Childと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1707年10月31日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロクスブリーで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Bowen(이)가 대략 1635년 웨일스 글램르건 가워에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Griffith Bowen(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Fleming(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1653년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 Benjamin Child(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1707년 10월 31일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 록스버이에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Bowen nasceu aproximadamente 1635, em Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Griffith Bowen, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fleming, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Benjamin Child aproximadamente 1653, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de outubro de 1707, em Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Bowen родилась около 1635 г. в местности гоуир, глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Griffith Bowen было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fleming, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin Child около 1653 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 31 октября 1707 г. в местности роксбури, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Bowen nació aproximadamente 1635, en Gower, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Griffith Bowen, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Fleming, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Benjamin Child aproximadamente 1653, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 31 de octubre de 1707, en Roxbury, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 73 años.
